selected_issue.issue: missing required run metadata fields in promotion report templates
selected_issue.title: Promotion report template contract gap for branch/lane/status metadata

why_it_outranked_alternatives: Current evidence showed no unresolved rank 1-4 issues: canonical tests passed (360), replay assessment had no mismatch signal, and structural/behavioral/invariant violation totals were zero. The highest unresolved bounded item was rank 5 missing instrumentation: templates lacked required run metadata keys for consistent traceability.

checks.command: rg required metadata fields in promotion_report_template.md/.json
checks.result: baseline missing required top metadata contract fields

files_changed.change: Added required top metadata block and recommendation value contract.
Added top-level run metadata fields and allowed-value arrays for status/recommendation.
Added human-readable report for this run.
Added machine-readable report for this run.

before_after_evidence.before: Templates lacked explicit required run metadata keys (branch/base_branch/lane/run_type/status/recommendation) at report top-level contract.
before_after_evidence.after: Both markdown and JSON templates now include required run metadata contract fields and constrained values.

unresolved_risks: Historical reports are not backfilled to the new template contract in this run.
Allowed values are represented by convention fields, not an enforced JSON Schema validator.
stop_reason: Selected rank-5 instrumentation issue fixed and validated with minimal bounded changes; further work would exceed single-issue scope.
